name: Grid Background
description: Customizable grid and dot pattern backgrounds using CSS, perfect for adding subtle texture to any section with optional radial fade.
whenToUse: Use as a background pattern for hero sections, content areas, or any section that needs a subtle grid or dot texture.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS classes for the grid container

props.name: children
props.description: Content to display on top of the grid background
